lineage.Process: CreateLocator CAN "M:\Processing_Scripts\Create_Locator_Service\results\processing.gdb\RoadCenterlines_GDB StreetAddress" 'StreetAddress.COUNTRY RoadCenterlines_GDB.CountryCode';'StreetAddress.POSTAL_LEFT RoadCenterlines_GDB.PostCode_L';'StreetAddress.POSTAL_RIGHT RoadCenterlines_GDB.PostCode_R';'StreetAddress.STREET_NAME_JOIN_ID RoadCenterlines_GDB.NGUID';'StreetAddress.HOUSE_NUMBER_FROM_LEFT RoadCenterlines_GDB.FromAddr_L';'StreetAddress.HOUSE_NUMBER_TO_LEFT RoadCenterlines_GDB.ToAddr_L';'StreetAddress.HOUSE_NUMBER_FROM_RIGHT RoadCenterlines_GDB.FromAddr_R';'StreetAddress.HOUSE_NUMBER_TO_RIGHT RoadCenterlines_GDB.ToAddr_R';'StreetAddress.PARITY_LEFT RoadCenterlines_GDB.Parity_L';'StreetAddress.PARITY_RIGHT RoadCenterlines_GDB.Parity_R';'StreetAddress.STREET_PREFIX_DIR RoadCenterlines_GDB.St_PreDir';'StreetAddress.STREET_PREFIX_TYPE RoadCenterlines_GDB.St_PreTyp';'StreetAddress.STREET_NAME RoadCenterlines_GDB.St_Name';'StreetAddress.STREET_SUFFIX_TYPE RoadCenterlines_GDB.St_PosTyp';'StreetAddress.STREET_SUFFIX_DIR RoadCenterlines_GDB.St_PosDir';'StreetAddress.FULL_STREET_NAME RoadCenterlines_GDB.FullStreetName';'StreetAddress.CITY_LEFT RoadCenterlines_GDB.IncMuni_L';'StreetAddress.CITY_RIGHT RoadCenterlines_GDB.IncMuni_R';'StreetAddress.REGION_LEFT RoadCenterlines_GDB.State_L';'StreetAddress.REGION_ABBR_LEFT RoadCenterlines_GDB.Prov_Abbriviation';'StreetAddress.REGION_RIGHT RoadCenterlines_GDB.State_R';'StreetAddress.REGION_ABBR_RIGHT RoadCenterlines_GDB.Prov_Abbriviation' M:\Processing_Scripts\Create_Locator_Service\locators\streets_l_16_03_2026.loc ENG # # # LOCAL_EXTRA_HIGH CURRENT_VERSION
